assessment.note: He doubts that his current work is the kind that earns recognition, a strong negative growth signal; also reveals a recognition/alignment concern worth a clarity probe next.

new_queue.label: Recognized work
new_queue.name: What work do you think gets recognized here instead?
new_queue.description: Drills into his recognition model to surface the specific gap between his current work and what he believes matters.

new_queue.label: Support needed
new_queue.name: What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?
new_queue.description: Closes on concrete support and next-step stability without opening a new issue.
